sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28028" key="docopaideutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοξο-παιδευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n28028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having the semblance of education,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg007.perseus-grc1:223b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">223b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
